tasks.subject: Task 6: Split render_provision into build/runtime phases
tasks.description:
**Goal:** render_provision returns build_script (pip + composed upscaler/interpolator install) + runtime_script (everything else) while script stays byte-identical.

**Files:** interfaces.py (RenderedProvision), engines/diffusers/__init__.py (render_provision), tests/engines/diffusers/test_render_provision_split.py + _golden_provision.json

**Acceptance:** RenderedProvision build_script/runtime_script fields; build has pip/BSA/weights not runtime bits; runtime has server not installs; script byte-identical golden.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_render_provision_split.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/engines/diffusers/__init__.py", "tests/engines/diffusers/test_render_provision_split.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/engines/diffusers/test_render_provision_split.py -v", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: FlashVSR BSA guard tolerates no-GPU build env
tasks.description:
**Goal:** BSA SM80 guard no-ops when no CUDA device (build time) instead of exit 87; still enforces SM80+ at runtime.

**Files:** upscalers/flashvsr/_engine.py (guard), tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py

**Acceptance:** guard uses torch.cuda.is_available(); curl+pip install lines unchanged.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/upscalers/flashvsr/_engine.py", "tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/upscalers/flashvsr/test_engine.py -v", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Thread build/runtime split onto InstanceSpec + orchestrator
tasks.description:
**Goal:** InstanceSpec carries image_build_script + runtime_provision_script; orchestrator populates from rendered split; RunPod ignores both.

**Files:** interfaces.py (InstanceSpec), orchestrator.py (spec build), tests/core/test_orchestrator_provision_threading.py

**Acceptance:** InstanceSpec two new fields; orchestrator spec has image_build_script==rendered.build_script, runtime_provision_script==rendered.runtime_script, provision_script==rendered.script.

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_provision_threading.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/interfaces.py", "src/kinoforge/core/orchestrator.py", "tests/core/test_orchestrator_provision_threading.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_orchestrator_provision_threading.py -v", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: ModalProvider bakes build script into the image
tasks.description:
**Goal:** build_modal_app runs image_build_script via Image.run_commands; boot payload uses runtime script only.

**Files:** providers/modal/_app.py (ModalAppRequest + build_modal_app), providers/modal/__init__.py (create_instance), tests/providers/modal/test_image_bake.py

**Acceptance:** ModalAppRequest image_build_script field; image.run_commands(build_script) when set; boot payload from runtime_provision_script or provision_script (no pip/BSA, server exec present).

**Verify:** pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_image_bake.py -v

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/providers/modal/_app.py", "src/kinoforge/providers/modal/__init__.py", "tests/providers/modal/test_image_bake.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/providers/modal/test_image_bake.py -v", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10 (native #6): Live FlashVSR 4x proof on Modal — run, frame-QA, teardown, log
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Re-run FlashVSR upscale on Modal 80GB with fast boot; 1920x1920 output; frame-QA; teardown; log §24. USER-GATE (tracked as native task #6). Blocked by Tasks 6-9.

**Verify:** pixi run kinoforge list (clean); ffprobe 1920x1920; §24 present.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["successful-generations.md", "PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run kinoforge list", "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "one", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["source", "480", "input"], ["output", "1920", "upscaled"]], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
